mapper.select: SELECT q.qna_id, q.member_id, q.qna_title, q.qna_content, q.qna_hit, q.qna_created_at, q.qna_updated_at, q.qna_status, q.qna_is_secret, m.member_name, aa.admin_answer_created_at FROM qna q JOIN member m ON q.member_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN admin_answer aa ON q.qna_id = aa.qna_id ORDER BY q.qna_created_at DESC

SELECT q.qna_id, q.member_id, q.qna_title, q.qna_content, q.qna_hit, q.qna_created_at, q.qna_updated_at, q.qna_status, q.qna_is_secret, m.member_name FROM qna q JOIN member m ON q.member_id = m.member_id WHERE q.qna_id = #{qnaId}
mapper.update: UPDATE qna SET qna_hit = qna_hit + 1 WHERE qna_id = #{qnaId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO qna (member_id, qna_title, qna_content, qna_hit, qna_created_at, qna_updated_at, qna_status, qna_is_secret) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{qnaTitle}, #{qnaContent}, 0, NOW(), NOW(), '답변대기', #{qnaIsSecret} )
mapper.update: UPDATE qna SET qna_title = #{qnaTitle}, qna_content = #{qnaContent}, qna_is_secret = #{qnaIsSecret}, qna_updated_at = NOW() WHERE qna_id = #{qnaId}
UPDATE qna SET qna_status = #{qnaStatus} WHERE qna_id = #{qnaId}
